untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'multiple tests' of resistance/support over an unspecified number of bars and comparing conviction changes across different timeframes (multi-timeframe analysis). The engine does not support: (1) lookback loops to count sequential failed tests, (2) explicit timeframe switching/ratio comparisons, (3) 'rounding or consolidation pattern' detection without specific indicator definitions. The source text is also incomplete ('subsumed into a tradin...'), preventing full signal reconstruction. Thresholds for min_failed_tests, volume_decline, and timeframe_ratio are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in original specification.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using single-bar price action (test above high, pullback below high) combined with volume decline. However, this is insufficient without multi-bar lookback logic. A complete implementation would require custom pattern-matching code outside standard indicator constraints.
